template.name: allocation_file_detail_ingestion
template.description: Record a single line item from the allocation file by drawing down the per-file Allocation Clearing (10104) and recognizing the deposit liability in the per-file Unallocated Customer (20900) on the economic ledger, with a mirror on the allocation ledger (11901 to per-file 21900). The deposit obligation is recognized at ingestion time even before the consumer is identified. The consumer_external_id is carried as metadata for the reconciliation service (T5104) to match later.

financial_statements_impact.description: Per-file Allocation Clearing (10104) is debited on the economic ledger, drawing down the clearing balance established by the batch header (T5108).
Per-file Unallocated Customer (20900) is credited, recognizing the deposit liability for this line item before the consumer is identified.
Cash Balances - Clearing (11901) is debited on the allocation ledger, recording the expected FDIC fund location for this unallocated deposit.
Per-file Unallocated Customer FBO (21900) is credited on the allocation ledger, establishing the unallocated FDIC custodial position.

template.trigger: Per line item in the allocation file, after the batch header (T5108) has established the per-file allocation clearing balance. Fires once per detail line.

ledger_scope_descriptions.fdic_tracking: FDIC tracking ledger (ID 5002) where Cash Balances Clearing and per-file Unallocated Customer FBO positions are updated for FDIC tracking.
ledger_scope_descriptions.operational: Operational ledger (ID 5001) where the per-file allocation clearing balance is drawn down and the unallocated deposit liability is recognized.

accounting_treatments.description: Recognize the deposit liability for this line item by drawing down the per-file allocation clearing and crediting the per-file unallocated customer account; consumer identity resolved later by reconciliation.
Record the expected FDIC fund location for this unallocated deposit by debiting Cash Balances Clearing and crediting the per-file Unallocated Customer FBO on the allocation ledger.

account_code_validations.description: Per-file Allocation Clearing instance on the economic ledger; debited to draw down the clearing balance for this line item.
Per-file Unallocated Customer liability on the economic ledger; credited to recognize the deposit obligation before consumer matching.
Cash Balances - Clearing asset on the allocation ledger; debited to record the FDIC fund location for this unallocated deposit.
Per-file Unallocated Customer FBO liability on the allocation ledger; credited to establish the unallocated FDIC custodial position.

line_reference.description: Deterministic per-line identifier within the allocation file for idempotency and deduplication.

marketplace.description: White-labelled product line identifier for this detail line (e.g. CraftNest, QuickBite, SkillForge, SeatVault, StayLocal). Optional — used for analytics and audit traceability.

payment_rail.description: Inbound payment rail that originated the deposit (e.g. ACH, WIRE, PUSH_TO_DEBIT, PAYPAL). Optional — used for analytics and reconciliation traceability.

statement_file_id.description: Bank statement file reference linking this allocation detail line to the corresponding bank statement for traceability. Optional at ingestion time; populated by reconciliation if known.

allocation_file_id.description: Allocation file reference used to select the per-file Allocation Clearing (10104) and Unallocated Customer (20900/21900) instances.

consumer_external_id.description: Raw consumer reference from the allocation file (NOT resolved to an account_id). Carried as metadata for the reconciliation service to match later.

legs.description: Recognize the deposit obligation for this file line item; the specific consumer will be identified during reconciliation (T5104).
Record the expected FDIC fund location for this unallocated deposit on the allocation ledger.

examples.name: detail_line_consumer_a_8000
examples.description: Load detail line for consumer-A ($8,000.00) from allocation file alloc-2026-02-23-001. Deposit liability recognized in per-file Unallocated Customer (20900); consumer_external_id carried as metadata for later matching.

examples.name: detail_line_consumer_b_2000
examples.description: Load detail line for consumer-B ($2,000.00) from allocation file alloc-2026-02-23-001. This is the second and final line, drawing the per-file allocation clearing balance to zero.
